Mexican Peso (MXN) — CoT Supplementary Methodology

Market: Mexican Peso FX Futures Exchange: CME Role: EM carry & risk-on sensitivity
  • Positioning reflects carry appetite and global risk sentiment.
  • Crowded longs imply vulnerability to global funding shocks.
  • Sharp flow reversals often precede EM stress episodes.
  • Use MXN as an early-warning EM risk proxy.
Interpretation-only methodology. Not a trading signal.
